//: kasas MCP for Claude Desktop. Pick ONE of the two 'kasas' blocks below and merge it into your real claude_desktop_config.json (Settings -> Developer -> Edit Config). Remove the comment keys before saving.

kasas.//: OPTION A (recommended for a local kasas): stdio subprocess. No token needed - it is a local process. Update the two absolute paths.

kasas-http-alternative.//: OPTION B: bridge to kasas MCP-over-HTTP (/mcp) using the mcp-remote shim, so you can send the dashboard token as a bearer header. Requires Node. Delete the 'kasas' stdio block above if you use this, and rename this key to 'kasas'.
